news.title: Oil edges back up, shares steady after US-Iran talks postponed
news.description: Oil prices edged back up and stock markets stabilised Friday after postponement of US-Iran peace deal talks.Friday saw oil prices back up slightly as Brent stood up 0.7 percent at $80.41 a barrel while West Texas Intermediate gained 0.3 percent to $76.85.
